summary:
Lua C module implementing the ChaCha stream cipher
      (http://cr.yp.to/chacha.html) and its version normalized by IETF.
raw_content:
Lua C module implementing the ChaCha stream cipher
      (http://cr.yp.to/chacha.html) and its version normalized by IETF.
generated_summary: chacha is a library for implementing the ChaCha stream cipher complete usually used in the fields of crypto.
phase1: A Lua C module for implementing the ChaCha stream cipher, following the IETF standard.
phase2: Provides a pure Lua implementation of ChaCha, compatible with Lua 5.1, 5.2, and LuaJIT.
phase3: Includes functions for key generation, initialization, and encryption/decryption, suitable for cryptographic applications.
